product.title: Product Management
product.name: Name
product.parentHint: Parent (Products.vue) manages data and passes it to child components via props.
product.listHint: Child (ProductList.vue) receives products from parent via props, emits edit/delete events to parent.
product.formHint: Child (ProductForm.vue) receives product data from parent via props, emits save/cancel events to parent.
product.paginationHint: Child (ProductPagination.vue) receives pagination state via props, emits page-change to parent.
product.filterHint: Child (ProductFilter.vue) receives filters via props, emits filter-change to parent.

lifecycle.title: Vue Lifecycle Hooks
lifecycle.subtitle: Interactive demo of all Composition API lifecycle hooks. Watch the log panel as you interact.
lifecycle.updateHint: Click +/- to change count → triggers onBeforeUpdate & onUpdated
lifecycle.mountHint: Toggle child → triggers onBeforeMount, onMounted, onBeforeUnmount, onUnmounted
lifecycle.keepAliveHint: Switch tabs → cached component triggers onActivated & onDeactivated instead of mount/unmount
lifecycle.errorHint: Click trigger error → parent onErrorCaptured catches render errors from child
lifecycle.logEmpty: Interact with the demos above to see lifecycle hooks fire...
lifecycle.setupDesc: Runs once when component is created. Replaces Options API beforeCreate/created.
lifecycle.beforeMountDesc: Called before the component is mounted to the DOM.
lifecycle.mountedDesc: Called after the component is mounted. DOM is available. Good for API calls.
lifecycle.beforeUpdateDesc: Called before the component re-renders due to reactive data change.
lifecycle.updatedDesc: Called after the component has updated. DOM has been patched.
lifecycle.beforeUnmountDesc: Called before the component is removed from the DOM.
lifecycle.unmountedDesc: Called after the component is removed. Good for cleanup (timers, listeners).
lifecycle.activatedDesc: Called when a cached component (KeepAlive) is re-activated.
lifecycle.deactivatedDesc: Called when a cached component (KeepAlive) is deactivated.
lifecycle.errorCapturedDesc: Called when an error from a child component is captured.
lifecycle.beforeMountDetail: DOM not ready yet, about to mount
lifecycle.mountedDetail: DOM is ready, can access elements
lifecycle.beforeUpdateDetail: Reactive data changed, about to re-render
lifecycle.childBeforeUpdate: Child props changed, about to update
lifecycle.cachedHint: Wrapped in <KeepAlive>, state preserved when switching tabs
lifecycle.cachedUnmounted: Only when KeepAlive cache is cleared

reactivity.title: Computed, Watch & Methods
reactivity.subtitle: Simple order form demo showing ref data, computed properties, watchers, and methods.
reactivity.dataHint: Reactive data with ref(). Changes automatically update computed and trigger watch.
reactivity.methodHint: Functions that modify data or perform actions. Called on button click.
reactivity.computedHint: Derived values that auto-update when dependencies change. Cached until deps change.
reactivity.watchHint: watch() runs side effects when data changes. Edit name or quantity to see logs.
reactivity.logEmpty: Change firstName, lastName or quantity to see watch fire...
reactivity.computedDesc: Auto-derived from other data. Use when you need a calculated value in the template.
reactivity.watchDesc: React to data changes. Use for side effects like API calls, logging, or syncing.
reactivity.methodDesc: Regular functions for user actions. Use for event handlers and business logic.

mixin.title: Mixin Demo
mixin.subtitle: Experience Vue Mixins — reusable logic shared across Options API components.
mixin.note: Mixins only work with Options API (not <script setup>). In Vue 3, Composables are the recommended replacement.
mixin.parentHint: Uses mixins: [counterMixin, loggerMixin] — gets count, increment, addLog automatically.
mixin.childHint: Also uses counterMixin — same logic reused without duplication.
mixin.logHint: From loggerMixin — addLog() records all actions.
mixin.logEmpty: Click buttons to see mixin methods in action...
mixin.mergeData: Merged into component data. Component data takes priority on conflict.
mixin.mergeMethods: Merged into methods. Component methods override mixin methods on conflict.
mixin.mergeHooks: Both run — mixin hooks first, then component hooks.
mixin.mergeComputed: Merged into computed. Component computed overrides mixin on conflict.

auth.subtitle: Sign in to your account
auth.invalidCredentials: Invalid email. Use admin@gmail.com or user@gmail.com
auth.adminWelcome: Welcome back, {name}! Here's your admin overview.
auth.userSubtitle: This is your simple user page with personal data.
